settings.text:
PLEASE READ THESE PRIVACY POLICIES CAREFULLY

LAST UPDATED : 14 August 2025

1. Introduction

At The Window Shop’s website, we value your privacy and are committed to protect your privacy in accordance with the Data Privacy Act of 2012 (RA10173) of the Republic of the Philippines. This page will enlighten you about our Privacy Policy in the areas of data collection, data usage, data disclosure, and safeguarding your information when you visit our website and its services. By using this website, you consent to the practices explained in our Privacy Policy. 

2. Information We Collect

We may collect and process the following types of personal information:

  • Personal Information: such as your name, email address, contact number, company name, and any other information you voluntarily provide through our contact or inquiry forms.

  • Technical Data: such as IP address, browser type, device information, pages visited, and date/time of access.

  • Cookies and Similar Technologies: We may use cookies to improve your experience and track website usage. You may disable cookies through your browser settings.

3. Purpose of Collection

We collect your personal information for the following legitimate purposes:

  • To respond to your product or service inquiries.

  • To send updates or marketing communications (only with your consent).

  • To improve our website functionality and content.

  • To comply with legal obligations and regulatory requirements.

  • To analyse usage trends and user behaviour on our website.

4. Legal Basis for Processing

We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:

  • Your consent, which you give when you submit a form or opt in to receive communications.

  • Compliance with legal obligations.

  • Legitimate interest, such as website analytics and marketing.

5. Data Sharing and Disclosure

We do NOT sell or trade your personal information. However, we may share your data under the following circumstances:

  • Service providers (e.g., email marketing tools, web hosting providers) who assist us in website operations, under strict confidentiality agreements.

  • Government agencies or law enforcement, if required by law or to protect legal rights.

  • In the case of business transfers such as a merger or sale of assets, where user data may be part of the transferred assets.

6. Data Retention

We will retain your personal data only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes stated in this policy, or as required by law. When no longer needed, your information will be securely deleted or anonymised.

7. Your Rights Under Philippine Law

Under the Data Privacy Act, you have the following rights:

  • Right to be informed about how your data is collected and used.

  • Right to access your personal data.

  • Right to object to processing or to withdraw consent.

  • Right to erasure or blocking of data under certain conditions.

  • Right to damages in case of misuse or unauthorized processing.

  • Right to data portability upon request.

  • Right to file a complaint with the National Privacy Commission.

8. Data Security

We implement appropriate physical, technical, and organizational measures to safeguard your personal information. While we take reasonable precautions, no method of data transmission over the internet is completely secure.

9. Third-Party Links

Our website may contain third-party links to websites (i.e. Facebook and Instagram) for convenience. Accessing these external websites are at your own risk. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these third-party sites.

10.  Modification

We reserve the right to update or make changes with the Privacy Policy on this website at any time. All changes made will be posted with the effective date and the date of the revision will be indicated at the top of the page. It is encouraged that you review this policy periodically.
